channel.title: Italian on Gourmand Syndrome
channel.description: Recent content in Italian on Gourmand Syndrome

item.title: Paparoto Cucina
item.description: After landing in Sao Paulo, we had some errands to run around town. As the evening gets darker, we finished our errand and were hungry. This item was on my partner’s list for quite some time. This restaurant comes from a Brazilian MasterChef Professional winner, Dayse Paparoto. We were able to walk in at around 9:45 PM on a Thursday evening without any lines or wait whatsoever. We were seated in a 2-seater near the door.
